info.name: Secure Biometric E-Voting - Backend API
info.description:
Collection to test the Secure Biometric E-Voting System backend.

**Base URL:** Uses variable `base_url` (default: http://localhost:8001). Change in collection or environment to match your server port.

request.description: API root - returns message and docs link.
Health check for deployment and monitoring (root-level).
Versioned health check - liveness (status, version, stage). Only available if versioned API is mounted in main.
Get voter details by voter ID (UUID). Set collection variable voter_id after registering a voter.

body.raw:
{
  "first_name": "Jane",
  "surname": "Doe",
  "previous_first_name": null,
  "previous_surname": null,
  "date_of_birth": "1990-05-15T00:00:00",
  "email": "jane.doe@example.com",
  "national_insurance_number": null,
  "passport_number": null,
  "passport_country": null,
  "consituency_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "renew_by": "2026-12-31T23:59:59",
  "registration_status": "pending",
  "failed_auth_attempts": 0,
  "locked_until": null,
  "registered_at": "2025-03-16T12:00:00"
}

request.description: Register a new voter. Use a valid constituency UUID from GET /constituencies. Copy returned id into collection variable voter_id for other voter requests.
Update a voter's details. All body fields are optional. Uses collection variable voter_id.
